div.h3: Successful CAS (Compare-And-Swap) defines the atomic instant of state transition

div.p: Requirement: If operation $Op_1$ completes before $Op_2$ starts, then $LP(Op_1) < LP(Op_2)$. Observation:

ul.li: Therefore, the stack must contain 42 when $Op_B$ linearizes.

g.title: Linearization point: The moment push(42) becomes visible to all threads.
Linearization point: The moment 42 is logically removed from the stack.
Linearization point: The moment push(42) becomes visible to all threads.
Linearization point: The moment 42 is logically removed from the stack.
